revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:石井神社]]
'''Ishii Shrine''' (石井神社, pronounced Ishii Jinja or Iwai Jinja) refers to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} located across Japan.
* {{ill|Ishii Shrine (Yokote)|ja|石井神社 (横手市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Yokote)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579258|1=Ishii Shrine (Yokote)}} - Located in {{ill|Yokote, Akita|en|Yokote, Akita|qid=Q496479|lt=Yokote, Akita|1=Yokote, Akita}}, {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|qid=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture|1=Akita Prefecture}}, in Omonogawa-cho Aizuka. * {{ill|Ishii Shrine (Kasama)|ja|石井神社 (笠間市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Kasama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579259|1=Ishii Shrine (Kasama)}} - Located in {{ill|Kasama, Ibaraki|en|Kasama, Ibaraki|qid=Q845851|lt=Kasama, Ibaraki|1=Kasama, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, in Ishii. * {{ill|Ishii Shrine (Kōtō)|ja|石井神社 (江東区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Kōtō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579260|1=Ishii Shrine (Kōtō)}} - Located in {{ill|Kōtō|en|Kōtō|qid=Q215175|lt=Kōtō, Tokyo|1=Kōtō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, in Kameido. * {{ill|Ishii Shrine (Kashiwazaki)|ja|石井神社 (柏崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Kashiwazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579261|1=Ishii Shrine (Kashiwazaki)}} - Located in {{ill|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|en|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|qid=Q633983|lt=Kashiwazaki, Niigata|1=Kashiwazaki, Niigata}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}, in Nishiyama-cho Ishiji. Designated as a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. * {{ill|Iwai Shrine (Izumozaki)|ja|石井神社 (出雲崎町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwai Shrine (Izumozaki)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Izumozaki|en|Izumozaki|qid=Q1204583|lt=Izumozaki, Niigata|1=Izumozaki}}, Niigata Prefecture. * {{ill|Tsunaga Shrine|lt=Tsunaga Shrine|lt=Ishii Shrine (Ise)|ja|津長神社|lt=Tsunaga Shrine|lt=Ishii Shrine (Ise)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ise, Mie|en|Ise, Mie|qid=Q328067|lt=Ise, Mie|1=Ise, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}, in Uji Imazaike-cho. A subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Ise Grand Shrine). * {{ill|Ishii Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|石井神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Shrine (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579262|1=Ishii Shrine (Kyoto)}} - Located in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, in Nishikyō-ku Ōharano Ishizukuri-cho. Designated as a Shikinaisha.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|石井神社|version=102014655|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:石井神社]]
